## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/`)
- [ ] New feature or agent template (`feature/`)

## Version bump

- [ ] Patch — doc fix, small correction
- [ ] Minor — new agent, hook improvement, new doc
- [ ] Major — structural change to how Atlas works

## Checklist

- [ ] No personal data in any file
- [ ] `init.sh` still works after this change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Branch name follows naming convention (`feature/`, `fix/`, `docs/`)
